name: IBM Carbon v11
summary: A full IBM Carbon v11 flavor (#2141) — the White theme transcribed as a full DTCG override: #0f62fe IBM Interactive Blue, zero-radius sharp corners, compact density + immediate motion, IBM Plex type scale. Loaded through the #2017 manifest loader; its paired gap list records what tokens+intents reproduce and what needs a new bridge row or role (font-family, the layered surface model, state/focus tokens).
